description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python Build that can be triggered manually, on push to the master branch, or on pull requests. The workflow should have a build job that runs on multiple platforms (Windows, macOS, Ubuntu) and Python versions (3.11, PyPy 3.9). For each job, check out the repository with submodules, set up Python, install dependencies with pip, build and install the package, and run tests with pytest.
